title: SPELFunc Object Properties
description:
SPELFunc Object Properties

SPELFunc Object Properties and Results

The following list is a summary of properties for the SPELFunc object.  The details for each property are explained in the Description field.

Property	Description

Name Property	This property sets names of force guide objects.

Set a particular name.

Description Property	This property sets descriptions about force guide objects.

Describe the operation descriptions. Set a character string.

Enabled Property	Set whether to execute the force guide object.

True : Normal

False : When you do not execute the force guide object such as executing another force guide object instead.

StepID Property	StepID during the force guide object execution.

Set an ID.

StepID is an ID which is recorded in the log data. It helps you to understand which log data support a process.

It is applied when AutoStepID of the force guide sequence is False.

AbortSeqOnFail Property	It is whether to abort or continue the force guide sequence when the force guide object fails.

SPELFunc object is failed when the return value of the SPELFunc to be executed is False.

True : Normal

Abort the force guide sequence.

False : When the force guide sequence fails, the recovery motions are included or the force guide sequence will be able to continue.

FuncName Property	Set a SPELFunc name to be executed.

As the example below, a function to be specified by SPELFunc object must have a string type variable for an argument and the return value type must be Boolean.

Function MyFunc(ObjectName$ As String) As Boolean

   MyFunc = True

Fend

The following list is a summary of results for the SPELFunc object.  The details for each result are explained in the description field.

Result	Description

EndStatus	Execution results of the object.

Time	Execution time for the object.
